# Ayabonga Qwabi - Technical Co-founder as a Service

Senior Product Engineer specializing in building full-stack digital products for founders and agencies.

## Core Value Proposition
I turn business ideas into working digital products (apps, platforms, AI tools) without agency overhead or the junior dev lottery. I act as a technical co-founder, owning the full stack—mobile, backend, payments, AI, and cloud infrastructure.

## Services
- **Full-Stack Product Engineering**: End-to-end product builds (MVP to Scale).
- **AI Solutions**: Integration of LLMs, computer vision, and predictive analytics.
- **Cloud Architecture**: Scalable infrastructure design on GCP, AWS, and Azure.
- **Technical Co-founder as a Service**: Strategic technical partnership for non-technical founders.

## Strategic Solutions
- **Fintech Founders**: Custom payment engines and regulatory-ready architectures.
- **Logistics & Mobility**: Real-time tracking, dispatching, and fleet platforms.
- **HealthTech**: Secure patient records and clinical booking systems.
- **EduTech**: Cashless campus ecosystems and student management.
- **Marketplaces**: Multi-sided on-demand service platforms.
- **Established Brands**: Digital transformation and automated scale for offline-first businesses.
- **AI & Automation**: Strategic LLM integration and custom AI agent systems.

## Key Projects
- **Laundry Marketplace**: Turnkey service provider platform.
- **ClinicPlus**: Occupational healthcare booking platform.
- **UTap**: University NFC wallet and access system.
- **Queens Connect**: Community AI assistant.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, React Native, Tailwind CSS.
- **Backend**: Node.js, TypeScript, Python, Clojure.
- **Cloud/Data**: Supabase, Firebase, GCP, AWS, Azure.
- **AI**: OpenAI, LangChain, TensorFlow.

## Engagement Model
- **Phase 1**: Fixed-price product build/MVP.
- **Iteration**: Retainer or milestone-based scaling.
- **Expertise**: Deep understanding of South African payment gateways (Paystack) and SMME operations.

## Contact
- **Email**: aya@qwabi.co.za
- **Web**: https://qwabi.co.za
- **Quote**: https://qwabi.co.za/get-a-quote
